name: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in contract generation. We automate the onboarding process instead of manual onboarding and contract generation.
problem_solved: Inefficient client onboarding process leading to delays in contract generation.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient client onboarding process leading to delays in contract generation.
